title: elatostema gagnepainianum
intro: Elatostema gagnepainianum, also known as Gagnepain's creeping shield or creeping elatostema, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema gagnepainianum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various types of infections, such as urinary tract infections and skin conditions like eczema. Elatostema gagnepainianum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
